name: orca
description: Plan, phased execution, mandatory subagent audit, resolve, and archive: a disciplined Codex coding workflow with all state on disk under .orca/.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, and audit coding workflows with a pod of specialist subagents.
interface.longDescription: Orca runs a disciplined coding workflow on Codex: research and plan, phase-by-phase execution, a mandatory parallel subagent audit after every phase, decision resolution, and archival. State lives on disk under .orca/ and is shared across the Codex app, CLI, and IDE, so the same workflow runs unattended via desktop Automations or continuously via the CLI phase-runner.
